name: Mainflux
description: Open-source patent-free IoT cloud platform based on microservices for messaging, identity, and device connectivity.

seo.title: Mainflux — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Mainflux: Open-source patent-free IoT cloud platform based on microservices for messaging, identity, and device connectivity.

when_to_use: Open-source IoT cloud with messaging, auth, and device management
Microservices-based IoT platform deployable on Kubernetes
MQTT and HTTP device messaging with rules-based routing
Self-hosted IoT backend without cloud vendor lock-in
Edge-to-cloud IoT connectivity via open protocol bridges

cons: Requires real ops investment to run
review.verdict: Solid open-source IoT backbone for teams willing to self-host, not a managed-service replacement.
review.best_for: Teams with DevOps capacity wanting self-hosted open-source IoT infrastructure
review.not_for: Small teams wanting managed IoT or those without Kubernetes operations experience
